title: Permanent residence pathways for Hong Kong residents - Canada.ca
content:
## Permanent residence pathways for Hong Kong residents
Open until August 31, 2026
From: Error loading fee. Check the fee
                                list .
The temporary
                public policy for Hong Kong residents in Canada provides a pathway to permanent residence for
            eligible applicants and their families.
There are 2 streams you may be eligible for. You can apply for permanent residence under 1 of these 2
            streams:
- Stream A: In-Canada graduates
- Stream B: Canadian work experience
